overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian futuristic city at dusk. The scene transitions from a narrow sidewalk lined with neon-lit food vendors to a wide intersection under an elevated highway, then continues along an urban street with digital billboards and towering futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with neon food vending stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the green burrito stall and other food vendors

notable_agents.action: character in reflective gold jacket standing near the burrito stall

entered.detail: metal railing with dense green hedge running along the left side of the sidewalk
two-story blue wooden residential building with white trim and air conditioning units
green food vending stall with bright red BURRITO XXL neon signage
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street near the road
massive concrete elevated highway structure with red neon underlighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow city sidewalk bordered by a metal fence with green hedges on the left and a street on the right. A blue wooden building stands behind the fence while a green food stall with bright neon signage occupies the right foreground. Palm trees line the street and an elevated highway looms in the distance against a dusky sky.

events.description: screen briefly goes completely dark as camera passes through an obstruction or loading transition
emerging from darkness back to the mixed natural and neon lighting of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a pink vending stall while approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: pink and red automated vending stall with illuminated product displays
massive concrete support columns of the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: After a brief occlusion, the scene reveals a pink vending stall on the right as the camera continues forward. The blue building recedes into the background while the elevated highway structure grows larger ahead. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, and the environment opens up slightly as the intersection approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under elevated highway with graffiti

events.description: exits sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
large military-style truck drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: large dark truck with headlights on driving through the intersection
person standing at the street corner waiting near the traffic light

entered.detail: traffic signal pole with green walk light illuminated
large white graffiti text reading CORPORATIONS MUST DIE painted on the overpass underside
various street signs and traffic control devices at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the asphalt crosswalk and moves through the wide intersection beneath the massive elevated highway. Red neon lights illuminate the concrete underside of the overpass where prominent anti-corporate graffiti is visible. Vehicles including a large truck pass through the intersection as the camera navigates across.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with digital advertising and futuristic tower

events.description: completes crossing the street and turns slightly left to continue along the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past the overpass, approaching a digital billboard

entered.detail: tall digital advertising screen displaying illuminated product advertisements
street sign reading Creekmont mounted on a pole
futuristic skyscraper with illuminated glass facade and geometric architecture
tall concrete residential building with multiple balconies and lit windows

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along a concrete sidewalk beneath the shadow of the overpass. A bright digital billboard stands on the right while a massive futuristic glass tower rises in the distance ahead. The Creekmont street sign is visible as the environment transitions to a more open urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching commercial district with trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the tall building, passing a pedestrian coming the opposite way

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tank top and pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: pile of garbage bags and debris accumulated against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera advancing along the sidewalk with the digital billboard now prominent on the right. The futuristic glass tower grows larger in the center of the frame as the camera approaches. A pedestrian walks toward the camera while trash bags are visible piled against the left wall, emphasizing the gritty urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit city sidewalk that expands into a wide intersection before narrowing into a gritty urban corridor. It begins on a narrow path bordered by green hedges and a neon-lit food stall, moving past palm trees as an elevated highway looms in the dusky distance. As the camera pushes forward past a pink vending stall, the environment opens up, leading the character across an asphalt crosswalk and beneath the massive concrete overpass illuminated by red neon and anti-corporate graffiti. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the intersection and follows a concrete sidewalk beneath the shadow of the highway, passing a bright digital billboard and a Creekmont street sign. Finally, the camera advances toward a towering futuristic glass tower, passing piles of trash bags and oncoming pedestrians that emphasize the contrast between the city's high-tech architecture and its urban decay.
